reviews.review_title: Run Your Own Barbershop in VR
reviews.review_description:
Barbershop Simulator VR is a fun and immersive situational game where you step into the shoes of a barber while also running your own shop. Clients arrive with photo requests, and it’s up to you to match their styles with precision.

But the game goes beyond cutting hair—you’ll manage profits, hire cleaners, sanitize tools, and even invest in perks like a coffee machine to keep clients happy. These small details add depth and make your shop feel alive.

It’s both entertaining to experiment with styles and rewarding to slowly build a thriving business while learning the trade. A solid all-rounder and a perfect fit for VR.

Response to the developer:

I have submitted a refund request and it was not approved.

developer_response.body:
Hello, Thanks for the feedback, you can totally get your money back through the phone app, just submit a refund request :) Thank for playing my game and sorry it wasn't as good as you expected.

Update: If your refund request was not approved, that means you either played the game long enough that you're not eligible for a refund, or had the game for a long period. (That's Meta's rules not mine) if you want, you can join my discord, and I'll give you keys to one of my other games (you probably won't like it either because it's made by me) but you can try.

developer_response.body: If someone cares, this review clearly goes against "Relevance" guidelines that states meta should delete reviews that are about the platform and not the app itself. e.g. I don't own the meta platform to find out why the game is not showing up on this person's library. reviews.review_title: It needs realistic hair and more tools
reviews.review_description: This games needs to be more realistic like every customer comes in with spikey hair and it needs more hair like i could she the head and it needs more tools and shavers and there should be a box where the guards are at so you can grab them and put it on the clippper same with the cans it needs mutiple cans for each colors and then brooms sticks so you can clean the hairs and more chairs for mutiple customers and hireing like i cant just be working alone and a bigger space

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback, however:
- Due to low processing power of VR headsets, we had to traded off between realism and interactivity, some other games don't have an interactive brush-able hair and also less realistic than ours.
- the game has a shaver :)
- if you press A while holding the clipper you can switch clipper guards :)
- if you press A while holding the hair spray you can switch colors :)
- we're working on an update to add the broom

reviews.review_description: I think this is a fun VR game and really relaxing. I like the hair washing and cutting mechanics along with the ability to customize and level up my barbershop.
